---
title: "teacup e2e fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
---

Two diagrams sharing a font (scoping must keep their subsets apart), plus a
width override and a user id.

```{.tikz}
\draw[->, accent] (0,0) -- (1,0) node[right] {$a$};
```

```{.tikz}
\draw[->, accent2] (0,0) -- (0,1) node[above] {$b$};
```

```{#fig-circ .tikz width="25%"}
\draw[muted] (0,0) circle (1) node {$c$};
```
